entities.name: Audit Everything
entities.context: a principle stating that systems should be auditable to be trusted.

entities.name: YAML
entities.context: a data serialization format used for configuration files and data exchange.

entities.name: Git
entities.context: a version control system that tracks changes in source code.

relationships.context: V believes in the importance of auditing systems.
YAML is used to log changes as part of the auditing process.
Git is used to document changes and decisions.
